languages.text: "Моей мечтой было достичь пределов пустоты, которые еще не изведаны человечеством, познать их ужас — и величие". {n}Он на миг замирает, очарованный картиной, что предстала перед его внутренним взором.{/n} "Но это всего лишь мечта, которой, вероятно, не суждено сбыться".

"My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."
languages.original_text: "Моей мечтой было достичь пределов пустоты, которые еще не изведаны человечеством, познать их ужас — и величие". {n}Он на миг замирает, очарованный картиной, что предстала перед его внутренним взором.{/n} "Но это всего лишь мечта, которой, вероятно, не суждено сбыться".

traits.locale_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He freezes still for a moment, transfixed by the mental image.{/n} "But it is only a dream that will likely never be fulfilled."

"My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He freezes still for a moment, transfixed by the mental image.{/n} "But it is only a dream that will likely never be fulfilled."

"My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

"My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

languages.text: "Ich träumte davon, von der Menschheit noch unerforschte Teile der Leere zu erreichen, um ihre Schrecken zu erleben ... und ihre Erhabenheit." {n}Fasziniert von den Bildern vor seinem geistigen Auge hält er kurz inne.{/n} "Aber das ist nur ein Traum, der sich niemals erfüllen wird."
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: "Ich träumte davon, von der Menschheit noch unerforschte Teile der Leere zu erreichen, um ihre Schrecken zu erleben ... und ihre Erhabenheit." {n}Fasziniert von den Bildern vor seinem geistigen Auge hält er kurz inne.{/n} "Aber das ist nur ein Traum, der sich niemals erfüllen wird."

languages.text: « J'avais pour rêve d'atteindre des recoins de l'espace encore vierges de toute humanité, pour faire l'expérience de leur violence... et de leur grandeur. » {n}Il s'interrompt un instant, fasciné par l'image qu'il s'en fait.{/n} « Mais ce n'est hélas qu'un rêve, qui ne se réalisera peut-être jamais. »
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: « J'avais pour rêve d'atteindre des recoins de l'espace encore vierges de toute humanité, pour faire l'expérience de leur violence... et de leur grandeur. » {n}Il s'interrompt un instant, fasciné par l'image qu'il s'en fait.{/n} « Mais ce n'est hélas qu'un rêve, qui ne se réalisera peut-être jamais. »

languages.text: «Mi sueño era llegar a sectores del vacío que la Humanidad aún no hubiera explorado y conocer sus terrores... y su grandeza». {n}Se interrumpe por un momento, fascinado por la imagen que conjura su mente.{/n} «Pero eso es solo un sueño; uno que nunca podré cumplir».
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: «Mi sueño era llegar a sectores del vacío que la Humanidad aún no hubiera explorado y conocer sus terrores... y su grandeza». {n}Se interrumpe por un momento, fascinado por la imagen que conjura su mente.{/n} «Pero eso es solo un sueño; uno que nunca podré cumplir».

languages.text: "Hayalim; insanlık tarafından henüz keşfedilmemiş uzay bölgelerine ulaşmak, onların dehşetini ve ihtişamını keşfetmekti." {n}Zihninde oluşan görüntülerden etkilenerek bir an duraksıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu sadece bir hayal... Asla gerçekleşmeyebilecek bir hayal."
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: "Hayalim; insanlık tarafından henüz keşfedilmemiş uzay bölgelerine ulaşmak, onların dehşetini ve ihtişamını keşfetmekti." {n}Zihninde oluşan görüntülerden etkilenerek bir an duraksıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu sadece bir hayal... Asla gerçekleşmeyebilecek bir hayal."

languages.text: “我的梦想，是抵达人类尚未探索的虚空地带，去见识那里的恐怖与壮丽。”{n}他停顿片刻，沉浸在脑海的那副景象中。{/n}“但这终究只是一个梦，一个可能永远无法实现的梦。”
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: “我的梦想，是抵达人类尚未探索的虚空地带，去见识那里的恐怖与壮丽。”{n}他停顿片刻，沉浸在脑海的那副景象中。{/n}“但这终究只是一个梦，一个可能永远无法实现的梦。”

languages.text: 「私の夢は、人類がまだ訪れていない宇宙の領域に足を踏み入れ、その恐怖と壮大さを知る事でした。」{n}彼は一瞬の沈黙の後、心の眼に浮かぶ光景に魅了されたように言った。{/n}「しかしそれは夢に過ぎず、叶う事は決してないかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "My dream was to reach parts of the void yet unexplored by humanity, to know their terror — and their grandeur." {n}He pauses for a moment, fascinated by the image in his mind's eye.{/n} "But it is only a dream, one that may never be fulfilled."

traits.locale_text: 「私の夢は、人類がまだ訪れていない宇宙の領域に足を踏み入れ、その恐怖と壮大さを知る事でした。」{n}彼は一瞬の沈黙の後、心の眼に浮かぶ光景に魅了されたように言った。{/n}「しかしそれは夢に過ぎず、叶う事は決してないかもしれません。」
